Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_2 is on top of box_1; box_2 right side accessible.
Postcondition: box_2 has been pushed from its right side; both end effectors grasp nothing.

Precondition: Both end effectors grasp nothing; box_1 left and right sides accessible.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on its left & right sides.
